tvShow.name: I Will Find You
tvShow.overview: Wrongfully imprisoned for murdering his own son, a father sets out on a desperate rescue mission after learning the boy may still be alive.

episodes.name: Episode 1
episodes.overview: Trapped in prison for a murder he didn't commit, David Burroughs resolves to escape after a shocking revelation: his son may still be alive.

episodes.name: Episode 2
episodes.overview: The FBI enters the fray as David tries to stay out of sight. The Mackenzies come under fire as questions mount about their role in the case.

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: David and Rachel put their freedom on the line to find Hilde Winslow. Lenny and Philip drop a bombshell revelation about the night Matthew died.

episodes.name: Episode 4
episodes.overview: Hayden must decide whether to help his unexpected houseguest. Rachel hits a dead end. Lenny presents Cheryl with crucial new evidence.

episodes.name: Episode 5
episodes.overview: David resorts to desperate measures to draw out an enemy. Rachel does damage control after a major betrayal. Hayden is forced to pick a side.

episodes.name: Episode 6
episodes.overview: David must make a heartwrenching choice. Rachel faces serious danger. Sarah and Max's search for the truth comes at a cost.

episodes.name: Episode 7
episodes.overview: The hospital holds a key clue to finding Matthew — if David and Rachel can convince Ronald to help. Sarah gains a new ally in her investigation.

episodes.name: Episode 8
episodes.overview: With an unlikely ally at their side, David and Rachel have one chance to rescue Matthew from his captors — before he slips away for good.

alternativeTitles.title: Harlan Coben's I Will Find You
